name: Anchorage
author: PSWBSF
description:
Map of Anchorage, Alaska. Made using the Map Patcher by Kronifer and US Demand Generator by slurry.

Note: 2016 LODES data was used since this was the most recent data available. Since the population of Anchorage hasn't changed much since then, the data should be accurate enough.

Additional demand data as follows:

  • Airports: Ted Stevens Anchorage International Airport (ANC)

  • Universities: University of Alaska Anchorage

  • Entertainment/Tourism: Anchorage Museum, Alaska Native Historical Center, Alaska Zoo, Stadium District

  • Military Bases: Joint Base Elmendorf-Richardson (split into 9 demand points)
